    print(f"Row {i}: '{ascii_lines[i][6:25]}'")

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check yellow positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        b = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in b)
        max_row = max(p[0] for p in b)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_col = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color=Y, bounds=[{min_row},{max_row}]x[{min_col},{max_col}]")

# Click yellow in blue panel
# Blue panel is on the left (after swap), so yellow is at (55-56, 20-22)
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 56, 'col': 21}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
